text.title: BA Requirements Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: baseline-requirements
step.action: Snapshot current requirements; assign version=1.0.0; freeze.

step.name: intake-change-request
step.action: Classify scope/clarification/defect; tag req_id; capture submitter.

step.name: assess-impact
step.action: Estimate impact on design, code, tests, schedule.

step.name: route-for-approval
step.action: Match impact level to required approver tier.

step.name: update-register
step.action: Bump req version; append CR to history; notify downstream owners.
